description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a slightly upturned nose and tail, constructed from layered wood with a black grip tape surface on top. The deck is supported by two metal trucks, each mounted with a pair of white, cylindrical wheels that are typical for street or park use. The edges of the deck reveal the natural wood layers, contrasting with the dark grip tape. The grip tape appears solid black with no visible graphics or cut-outs, providing a grippy surface for the rider. The trucks are metallic and standard in design, with no visible branding or unique features. There are no visible brand logos or deck graphics, giving the skateboard a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
description: A classic, minimalist skateboard with a black grip tape deck, natural wood edges, white street wheels, and standard metal trucks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the skateboard, highlighting the black grip tape, natural wood edge, and white wheels.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded nose, black grip tape, and a clear look at the front truck and wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the deck's profile, wood layering, and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the tail's curvature, black grip tape, and the rear truck and wheels.
attribute_wheel_type: street, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard metallic trucks, silver color, no visible branding, standard kingpin mounting
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, cut-outs, or graphics
